HELP:
Pan & Tilt    
                Left stick
Zoom
                Right stick
Brightness    
                Left bumper : Decrease, 
                Right: Increase
Manual Focus
                Left trigger: Near, 
                Right: Far
Select Camera 
                A, B, X, Y: 1-4; 
                Long press: 5-8 
                Puts selected camera in Preview
Fade Preview to Program 
                Push left or right stick
AutoFocus mode
                "Next" button
White Balance  
                Back button
                short press: one push white balance
                long press: auto white balance
Presets 1-8   
                Hat, direction selects preset number 
                Short press: recall
                long press: set
